command: echo '=== POSTGRES ENV ===' && grep -i postgres /opt/n8n-traefik/.env 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && grep -i postgres /opt/n8n/.env 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== POSTGRES CONTAINER ===' && docker ps --filter 'name=postgres' --format 'table {{.Names}}	{{.Status}}	{{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== POSTGRES IP ===' && docker inspect n8n-traefik-db-1 --format '{{range .NetworkSettings.Networks}}{{.IPAddress}}{{end}}' 2>/dev/null || docker inspect n8n-postgres-1 --format '{{range .NetworkSettings.Networks}}{{.IPAddress}}{{end}}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'no postgres container found' && echo '' && echo '=== PORT 5432 ===' && ss -tlnp | grep 5432 2>/dev/null || echo 'not listening on host' && echo '' && echo '=== DOCKER COMPOSE for n8n ===' && cat /opt/n8n-traefik/compose.yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -A 20 'postgres\|db:' || echo 'no postgres in compose' && echo '' && echo '=== GITHUB TOKEN SEARCH ===' && grep -rsh 'GITHUB' /opt/n8n-traefik/.env /opt/n8n/.env /root/.env 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'no github tokens found'
intent: Check PostgreSQL credentials and GitHub tokens on VPS
